title: Orbital Strike canon fishing root
description: It adds two fishing roots. the firest is the OSC Nuke fishing root. this makes an tnt cluster in an radius of 100 blocks and an other that is OSC Digger. It makes an 5X5 hole. (Both are crafteble).
body: It adds two fishing roots. the firest is the OSC Nuke fishing root. this makes an tnt cluster in an radius of 100 blocks and an other that is the OSC Digger. It makes an 5X5 hole. (Both are crafteble).
